findings.title: Mode 3 uses the real minotari_payment_processor
findings.recommendation: Keep PP failures visible as benchmark output rather than bypassing the service.

findings.title: Genesis and birthday scans require birthday-encoded seeds
findings.recommendation: Use generated seeds and rewrite birthday for scan setup instead of RescanWallet(0).

findings.title: Mempool acceptance is not benchmark success
findings.recommendation: Verify claimed successful transactions with status value 6 before publishing throughput.
